payload.answer: Extracted two atomic cards: the sender joined Point72 last month relative to the email, and the sender requested the AI infra article.
citations: Yes, I joined Point72 last month.
Please send the AI infra article.

entity_resolution.reason: Only an email address is provided; do not assume a full name beyond the sender address/local-part.

memory_cards.statement: The sender at sam@example.com said they joined Point72 last month relative to this email.
The sender at sam@example.com asked to be sent the AI infra article.

details: Committed employment update with relative timing preserved because no email date was provided.
Recorded the article request as an actionable request, not a permanent preference.
